case_title: STEWART POLLOCK VS. ALL WAYS TRANSPORTATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF POLLOCK, STEWART

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $59.50) SERVED JAN-03-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALL WAYS TRANSPORTATION, INC. DBA TRANSPORTATION MOVING & STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF STEWART POLLOCK IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL BY PHONE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE CASTELLANOS ADVISED PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FOR FUTURE USE IF DEFENDANT ATTEMPTS TO VACATE JUDGMENT. JUDGE CASTELLANOS WILL ORDER THE COURT TO MAIL BACK PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED AS PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS WILL BE MAILED BACK TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
